title: Svalbard Global Seed Vault
description: Buried 120 meters into a sandstone mountain on Spitsbergen Island. Engineered to withstand nuclear strikes and tectonic shifts. Currently securing the global food supply.

title: Cheyenne Mountain Complex
description: Excavated under 2,000 feet of solid granite. A former NORAD command center designed to survive a multi-megaton nuclear yield. Protected by 25-ton blast doors.

title: Oppidum
description: Considered the largest billionaire bunker in the world. Originally a top-secret joint project between the Soviet Union and Czechoslovakia. Now retrofitted for ultra-luxury off-grid survival.

title: Survival Condo Project
description: A former Atlas F missile silo converted into a 15-story luxury survival complex. Walls consist of extreme-strength epoxied concrete.

title: Pine Gap
description: Joint defence facility run by Australia and the CIA. The surface radomes hide an extensive subterranean infrastructure.
